title: Grammy Awards Prediction Markets: Things Looking 'Golden' For KPop Demon Hunters
text: According to the prediction markets on Kalshi, Olivia Dean is the dominant favorite to win the Best New Artist Grammy. She commands a 72% chance of taking home her first Grammy award. The article notes that this category is more cut and dry than the Best Song Grammy market, with Dean's lead being substantial over other contenders. Addison Rae is listed as a potential sleeper option, available at 5 cents. The article suggests her dual careers in acting and music may not sway Recording Academy voters. The piece highlights that if Dean wins, she would become the fourth British female artist to win Best New Artist, following Amy Winehouse (2008), Adele (2009), and Dua Lipa (2019).
